Appointment.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the Field Service module is not granted to the API service account.

BusinessAccount.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the CRM module is not granted to the API service account.

Case.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the CRM module is not granted to the API service account.

Employee.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the Payroll module is not granted to the API service account.

InventoryQuantityAvailable.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the API service account lacks access. Use InventorySummaryInquiry or ItemWarehouse instead.

ItemClass.note: ClassIDs containing '/' (e.g. 'A/C') cannot be used as the get_record key - use the record GUID instead.

ItemWarehouse.note: ALWAYS pass select= with specific fields - full records are very large.

JournalTransaction.note: $select is not honored on this entity - pull records and pick fields client-side.

Lead.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the CRM module is not granted to the API service account.

Opportunity.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the CRM module is not granted to the API service account.

SalesPricesInquiry.note: Often NON-FUNCTIONAL via REST - queries (even filtered) tend to return 500 CannotOptimizeException. For pricing read StockItem/NonStockItem fields (DefaultPrice, MSRP, LastCost, AverageCost) instead.

ServiceOrder.note: May return 403 Forbidden if the Field Service module is not granted to the API service account.

StockItem.note: ALWAYS pass select= with specific fields - the full record is enormous and can blow the response limit.

VendorPricesInquiry.note: Often NON-FUNCTIONAL via REST - queries (even filtered) tend to return 500 CannotOptimizeException. For pricing read StockItem/NonStockItem fields (DefaultPrice, MSRP, LastCost, AverageCost) instead.
